title: Air India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Air India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Air India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Air India:
Air India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India!
